name: ImageZoom
usage_hint: Product image with hover/click-to-zoom magnifier. Shows 2.5x (default) zoomed view following cursor.
when_to_use: On product pages where detail matters (jewelry, fabrics, electronics, cosmetics). Two triggers: hover (desktop-friendly) or click (mobile-friendly). High-quality images required for zoom to be useful.
when_not_to_use: For images that don't benefit from zoom (graphics, text, low-res photos). When image is already cropped to show detail. For galleries with many images (use lightbox instead).
anti_patterns: Using low-resolution images (zoom reveals pixelation instead of detail)
Setting zoomLevel too high (>3x causes slow rendering on mobile)
Using trigger="hover" on touch-only pages (hover doesn't work — use "click")
